doctrine_note: Section metadata for the Maudlin Street archive gateway and inner-page navigation. Section IDs match the CSS data-section attribute on <body>; palettes are defined in src/assets/css/site.css. Child links are inline submenu entries shown when the parent is the active section (PJLM-style indented submenus). Status values follow the section-record schema: 'shell' = placeholder index, 'in_progress' = partial content, 'live' = first-class authored content. No section is 'live' yet at scaffold stage; everything is 'shell'.

sections.label: Releases
sections.summary: Smiths and Morrissey discography, chronological and by edition.

sections.label: Bootlegs
sections.summary: Unofficial live recordings, audience tapes, and broadcast captures.

sections.label: Media
sections.summary: Television, radio, magazine, and bibliographic appearances.

sections.label: Videos
sections.summary: Promos, performances, and documentary references. No media in repo; remote URLs only.

sections.label: Songs
sections.summary: Alphabetical song index. Links forward into lyric notes and discography entries.

sections.label: Lyrics
sections.summary: Lyric notes only. Full lyric bodies are never republished.

sections.label: Live
sections.summary: Concert chronology by tour and year.

sections.label: Influence
sections.summary: Predecessors, contemporaries, and the inheritance chain.

sections.label: Sources
sections.summary: Source authority register. PJLM is the definitive source of truth.

sections.label: About
sections.summary: What this site is, what it is not, and how source authority works.

sections.label: Search
sections.summary: Placeholder. Static-search wiring is a future, separately authorized phase.
